multiplier.description: Multiplier value used to compute holddown (value used to multiply the interval (default: 4))

forward-traffic.description: 'forward-all-traffic': Forward all traffic between bridge members; 'forward-ip-traffic': Forward only IP traffic between bridge members (default);

ve.description: Virtual Ethernet Port (Virtual Ethernet Port number)

icmp-normal-rate-limit.description: Normal rate limit. If exceeds this limit, drop the ICMP packet that goes over the limit

icmp-lockup.description: Enter lockup state when ICMP rate exceeds lockup rate limit (Maximum rate limit. If exceeds this limit, drop all ICMP packet for a time period)

icmpv6-normal-rate-limit.description: Normal rate limit. If exceeds this limit, drop the ICMP packet that goes over the limit

icmpv6-lockup.description: Enter lockup state when ICMP rate exceeds lockup rate limit (Maximum rate limit. If exceeds this limit, drop all ICMP packet for a time period)

ether-type.description: Ethernet paylaod type for L2BFD packets, help-val 16 bit hex value, default is hex 88B6

multiplier.description: Multiplier value used to compute holddown (value used to multiply the interval (default: 4))

peer-from.description: Peer member to forward received LACP packets

peer-to.description: Peer member to forward received LACP packets
